conflict: Joel and Paul assembling the full picture from civilian evidence
consequence: Joel and Paul know Tommy killed Cliff — the question is what they do with it
must_land_beats: Joel and Paul on the deck comparing notes — Paul's suspicion about Martin-Tommy, Joel's observations about Tommy-Cliff
They go to the study and find the fire document in the safe — the envelope has been unfolded twice by different hands
Joel reads Martin's account of the 2002 fire and Ray Toomey's death
The picture assembles: Cliff found the document, Cliff leveraged Tommy, Tommy killed Cliff
Joel and Paul must decide: go to Mallick, confront Tommy, or protect the group one last time the way Martin would have
Joel's legal mind and Paul's loyalty to Martin's memory should pull in opposite directions

payoffs_to_land.description: Joel and Paul find and read the fire document that Cliff discovered in Ch 8 and used as leverage in Ch 12. The crease pattern reveals it was handled by multiple people. The full picture of the murder motive is now assembled.

pressure_source: Joel and Paul assembling the full picture from civilian evidence
secondary_character_beats: Joel's public defender instincts should make him aware of what this evidence means legally — and what it doesn't prove without confession
state_shift: Joel and Paul know Tommy killed Cliff — the question is what they do with it
